Login Nexus Portal
Open the full-screen user login and access workspace for wallets, strategy routing, and payments. Admin access is available on /admin with OTP.

Confluence

Alignment score first, then watchlist + spikes, then today’s movement. News opens as a clean popup for scanning (not mixed into the main panel).

Alignment score

Bias — Verdict — Gates — Updated —

Watchlist & pulse

Pulse (indices, VIX, flows), stocks to watch from the live scanner, and session spikes — orientation only. Use the NEWS button above for headlines popup.

Stocks to watch

Engine-ranked names from the same F&O scanner as Signal Engine (vol/OI + gate context). Refreshes with Refresh desk or when you open this tab.

Intraday spikes (session)

Same detections as the SPIKES tab: signal time (IST), model entry / SL / T1 / T2 from last price at fire — open SPIKES for live status (LIVE · T1 · SL · expired).

      INTRADAY OPPORTUNITIES

      INDEX HUNT · TODAY’S TRAIL
      No Index Hunt signals yet today. When an alert fires, you’ll see signal time → in trade → target hit or stop hit here.
      SESSION PLAYBOOK
      9:15–10:00 DISCOVERY
      Watch only. Mark ORB high / low. No entries. Algo traps active. Spreads wide.
      10:00–13:30 ✦ TREND (BEST)
      All 5 gates must pass. Full position size. Momentum entries only.
      13:30–14:30 DRIFT
      No new entries. Manage open trades. Book partial profits here.
      14:30–15:30 EXPIRY
      Exit all. OI distortion. Max Pain gravity. Avoid new CE/PE buys.

      —WIN RATE
      —NET P&L
      CE: 5m impulse band + 30m trend supports direction · PCR ≥ pcr_ce_min · Nifty/BN aligned · quality floor
      PE: same + PCR > 1.4 + weak Nifty day · high VIX skips weak CE · T1/SL on index per config · lots 25 / 15
      📡
      Waiting for index hunt signals...
      Stricter trend + PCR + cross-index filters — tune INDEX_RADAR in config.py
      CE recommended on up moves · PE recommended on down moves
      FROM TO
      precision v2: ranked daily pick (1–3 per symbol/day) + session-open lock. ML TRAIN then restart server — filter uses ix_radar_gb.joblib when present.
      Open HISTORY and tap LOAD or BACKTEST.

      FROM TO
      ⚠ Max 60-day range (Kite minute-data limit)
      ◈
      Select a date range (max 60 days) and tap RUN BACKTEST
      FULL tier (quality≥80) = 2 lots · HALF tier (quality≥64) = 1 lot · P&L is lot-adjusted
      VIX >17 days blocked entirely · max 3 signals/day · stops after 2 consecutive SL

      STRATEGY · PAPER EXECUTE IF OPTIONS_CONTEXT_SCORE ≥ MIN SCORE
      Live CTX— vs min60 —

      Run ▶ FULL REPORT for paper-day counts in the window.

      —
      CONTEXT BACKTEST + REPORT

      1) ⬇ Download — DL days = how far back to pull daily NIFTY+VIX into adv_idx_options_daily (separate from ohlcv). 2) ▶ Report — Report days = length of the summary window (ending today). Min score (0–100) = cutoff on options_context_score (IV proxy from VIX + weekday gamma; higher ⇒ fewer "execute" days). Verdict = either ignore gates or blend the last signal_log verdict that day. If the table is empty, the report falls back to ohlcv∩vix_daily.

      Not option trades: "Paper trades" here means session days where the context score ≥ min score. No strikes, expiries, or option premiums are chosen or filled. Next session is NIFTY daily close → next row's close only. For dates, scores, and NIFTY close per day use ↓ JSON → daily_tail / executed_days_recent.

      Data source— Paper trades (executed days)— Days in sample— Execute rate— Gamma-expiry weekdays— Range— Next session (after execute)—

        Session playbook
        
        
        One primary playbook per session — regime tags from VIX · PCR · expiry · max pain pick a master intraday theme so ORB, OI, gamma, and stop-hunt logic do not fight. Pre-build checklist is persisted in backtest.db. Backtest block is diagnostic (daily bars only).

        POSITION SIZER
        VIX-adjusted · ATR-based · NSE lot-accurate calculator
        
      
        
      
        
        
        
          
        INPUTS
        
          
        
          
        
            
        1%
        
          
        
          
        
            
        
              
              
              
              
            
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
            
          
        
          
        
            
        1.5×ATR
        
          
        
        
        
        
        
          
        
            
        OUTPUT
        
            
        Max risk ₹₹5,000
        
            
        VIX ruleFULL SIZE
        
            
        Stop distance130 pts
        
            
        Lots to trade1 lot
        
            
        Position value₹6,10,300
        
            
        Capital used—
        
            
        Margin approx.—
        
          
        
          
        
            
        RISK BARS
        
            
        
          
        
        
        
        
        
          
        VIX SIZE RULES
        
          
        VIX <12FULL 100% size — safe regime
        
          
        VIX 12–1675% size — mild caution
        
          
        VIX 16–2050% size — high volatility
        
          
        VIX >2025% or NO TRADE
        
          
        3-STRIKE CAPITAL RULES
        
          
        
            Strike 1 → Reduce next trade 50%
        
            Strike 2 → 1 trade max, rest of session
        
            Strike 3 → Close all, stop trading
        
            Daily max loss = 2% of capital hard stop
          
        
          
        MARGIN GUIDE (NSE APPROX.)
        
          
        
            Nifty futures → ~₹1.2L per lot
        
            Bank Nifty → ~₹72K per lot
        
            Options (buy) → Premium only
        
            Options (sell) → ~₹1.5L margin

        VOLUME RADAR
        Delivery % · unusual OI concentration · price-volume divergence · surge alerts · FII vs retail
        
        NSE F&O UNIVERSE
      
        
      
        
        
        
          
        HIGH DELIVERY % — INSTITUTIONAL SIGNAL
        
          
        
            
        STOCKDEL%5D AVGΔSIGNAL
        
            
          
        
        
        
        
        
          
        
            
        PRICE-VOLUME DIVERGENCE
        
            
        Price up + Vol down = weak. Price down + Vol up = real sell.
        
            
        
          
        
          
        
            
        OI CONCENTRATION WALLS (>20% of total)
        
            
        
          
        
        
        
        
        
          
        
            
        VOLUME SURGE (>3× AVG)
        
            
        
          
        
          
        
            
        FII vs RETAIL OI POSITIONING

        GUIDE
        
      
        Build, test, and validate intraday options strategies using Python and real 1-min data. Use the system's live backtest engine as the benchmark.

        EXAMPLE TRADE · 171% RETURN
        
        
        Entry: 22100 CE at 09:16 → ₹140  |  Exit: 09:21 → ₹380
        
        
        Return = (380 − 140) / 140 = 171%  ·  This is a 100–200% move in 5 minutes
        
      
        
      
        
        
        +171%
        
        
        IN 5 MIN
        
      
        
    
        

    
    
        STRATEGIES TO TEST
        
    
        
      
        
        
        TEST 1 · VWAP BREAKOUT
        
        
        Entry: close > VWAP
        + price makes new high
        Strike: ATM + 100 CE
        Hold: 5 candles
        
      
        
      
        
        
        TEST 2 · VOLUME SPIKE
        
        
        Entry: vol > 2× avg
        + price move > 0.3%
        Filters false breaks
        Compare win rate
        
      
        
      
        
        
        TEST 3 · OI CONFIRM
        
        
        Entry: OI rising + price up
        + CE premium surging
        Highest edge quality
        Fewer, cleaner trades
        
      
        
    
        

    
    
        
      
        
        
        PYTHON BACKTESTER · PLUG & PLAY
        
        
      
        
      
    
        

    
    
        
      
        
        
        SAMPLE TRADE OUTPUT
        
        
        trades.csv

entry_time    strike  type  entry  max   exit  return%
09:16         22100   CE    140    380   350   +150%
        
      
        
      
        
        
        QUICK START
        
        
        
          1. Save the CSVs above as files
        
          2. Install: pip install pandas numpy
        
          3. Run: python backtest.py
        
          4. Tweak VOL_MULT_THRESH / HOLD_CANDLES
        
          5. Compare accuracy across Test 1/2/3
        
        
      
        
    
        

    
    
        
      
        ⚙ EXTEND YOUR BACKTESTER
        
      
        
        
        
          
        MULTI-DAY DATA
        
          
        Expand underlying.csv to 300+ rows across multiple sessions. Add date column and group by day before computing daily VWAP.
        
        
        
        
        
          
        ADD STOP-LOSS
        
          
        Track intra-candle lows vs SL = entry × 0.995. Exit early if low breaches SL before HOLD_CANDLES completes.
        
        
        
        
        
          
        BEARISH SIDE (PE)
        
          
        Mirror the logic: close < VWAP + price down > 0.3% + PE OI rising. Select ATM − 100 put. Track PUT premiums.

        REGIME GATE

      LIVE EDGE

      ⚡ EXECUTE SIGNAL

            ◎ HOW TO READ THIS
          
        
          
        
            Score < 50%Too weak — high false-signal risk. Stand down.
            Score 50–71%Watch only — wait for L1 order flow to confirm.
            Score ≥ 72%Execute — all 3 layers aligned with regime clear.
            L1 (50%)LTQ spike + OI velocity + VWAP band position.
            L2 (30%)IV rank/pct + GEX proximity + PCR extreme reversion.
            L3 (20%)Breadth (heavyweights above VWAP) + macro gate.
            ELEVATEDVIX 18-22: real edge needed, trade ½ lots only.
            GEX GravityMax-pain pin zone — expect price to return here.
            GEX Exp Dn/UpStrike where dealer hedging ADDS momentum (breakout fuel).
          
        
        
        

        
        
        
          
        
            ⚡ L1 · ORDER FLOW (real buying/selling pressure)
            —
          
        
          
        Strength—
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
            VWAP —
          
        
        
        

        
        
        
          
        
            ◈ L2 · OPTIONS SURFACE (IV + GEX + PCR)

        Strength—
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
            IV Rank —
            Skew —
          
        
        
        

        
        
        
          
        
            ◆ L3 · STRUCTURE (breadth + macro)

            ◆ MARKET BREADTH · 15 NIFTY HEAVYWEIGHTS
            —
          
        
          
        
            
        Load snapshot to populate
        
          
        
          
        10+/15 above VWAP = STRONG · 6-9 = MODERATE · <6 = WEAK
        
        
        

        
        
        
          
        
            ◬ GEX MAP · GAMMA EXPOSURE
            
          
        
          
        
            ⬤ Gravity: —
            ▲ Exp Up: —
            ▼ Exp Dn: —
            Skew: —
          
        
          
          
        
            Gravity = max-pain pin (price magnet)  | 
            Exp Dn = if breaks below this, dealers hedge by selling → momentum DOWN  | 
            Exp Up = dealers buy → momentum UP
          
        
          
        ← –GEX explosive | +GEX pinning →
        
          
        
        
        

        
        
        
          
        
            ▸ BACKTEST RESULTS
            
        
              
              
            
        
          
        
          
        
            
        WIN RATE
        —
        
            
        R:R
        —
        
            
        TOTAL P&L
        —
        
            
        MAX DD
        —
        
          
        
          
        
            
        TRADES
        —
        
            
        AVG WIN
        —
        
            
        AVG LOSS
        —
        
            
        EXPECTANCY
        —
        
          
        
          
        
            
        EQUITY CURVE
        
            
          
        
          
        
          
        RECENT TRADES
        
          
        
            
        
              
        
                Date
                Dir
                Entry
                Exit
                Pts
                P&L
                Score
              
        
              
        Run backtest to see trades
        
            
        
          
        
          
        
            Entry: next-day open · Exit: next-day close · 1 ATM lot (50 shares × delta) · Slippage: 0.4 pts/side
          
        
        
        

        
        
        
          
        
            ◎ MODEL FORMULA
          
        
          
        
            
        
              Score = L0_gate × (L1×0.50 + L2×0.30 + L3×0.20)
            
        
            
        
              L0 gateBinary kill switch — regime (VIX) × session window. 0 = no trade.
              L1 (50%)LTQ z-score · OI build velocity · VWAP σ deviation — actual order flow.
              L2 (30%)IV Rank/Pct · GEX proximity · PCR reversion edge — options intelligence.
              L3 (20%)10+/15 heavyweights above VWAP + macro gate 3/4 pass — broad market align.
            
        
            
        
              Why multiplicative? Any layer scoring 0 (e.g. regime = HIGH_VOL) kills the entire trade — prevents entering when even one critical condition fails. Additive models hide bad signals.

        AURORA SWING LAB
        
    
        SWING/POSITIONAL STOCK PICKS

    AURORA SWING LAB

        SWING/POSITIONAL EDGE
        
      
        
        
        —
        
        
        WIN
        
      
        
      
        avg — pts
        
    
        
    
        —
        KILL ZONE
        
  
        

  
  
        
    
    
        
      
        Positional simulation only: entry at next session open, then target/stop tracking for up to 10 trading days with WIN/LOSS/NEUTRAL outcome and a time-stop on the final day. Counts every symbol-day unless you tick EXECUTE names only. Neutral = no clean TP/SL path (or flat vs entry on time-stop). Not rupee P&L. 1 year may take 40-120+ min depending on API speed; keep this tab open and maintain a valid Kite token.

        Swing history
        
        
        Live and backtest signals (up to 3 years, ≤25k rows). Table uses a ₹20K-per-stock model for qty and P&L.
        
        
        
          Data sources & BUILD FROM BACKTEST
          
        Live rows appear on days the app ran. Use BUILD FROM BACKTEST to replay Swing Radar on backtest.db (NIFTY / VIX / PCR / FII + Kite daily bars) and backfill history. Empty FROM/TO → server loads roughly the last 3 years.
        
        
        
      
        
      
    
        
    
        
    
        
      
        
        Filter
        
        
        
        
        
        
        
      
        
      
        
        
        
          
          
          
          
          
          
          
        
        
      
        
    
        
    
        
      P&L model & backtest tags
      
        P&L uses per-stock quantity = floor(₹20,000 ÷ entry). Backtest rows show BACKTEST in the trigger. Run Backtest Download (3Y macro) first for full context.
